---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Bursts"
date: 2020-09-13
trailer: "gallery/bursts/preview/ff_13_19_5_40.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/bursts/extra/ff_13_19_5_40.jpg"
  caption: "Bursts"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery(preview_fmt = "png")
```
